purpose: Freeze a leakage-controlled MAPK14 train/validation/test partition before receptor screening or QUBO development.

split_protocol.grouping: connected components induced by non-chiral Murcko scaffold or shared source_molecule_id
split_protocol.label_balance: greedy group assignment toward per-label target counts

allowed_uses.train: pilot execution, receptor characterization, objective fitting, and model development
allowed_uses.validation: hyperparameter choice, protocol comparison, and development-stage selection only
allowed_uses.test: one final evaluation after receptor preparation, aggregation rule, QUBO objective, solver settings, and reporting metrics are frozen

prohibited_before_test_release: receptor selection using test labels or scores
QUBO coefficient fitting using test labels or scores
changing the split seed or group definitions after seeing validation results
interpretation_boundary: This file locks data roles and prevents leakage. It does not establish MAPK14 screening performance or external generalization.
